overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character exploring the University of San Andreas campus on a sunny day. The character ascends a long ceremonial stairway between historic brick buildings and a modern stadium, crosses an upper plaza, and enters a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial stairway between historic building and stadium

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide brick stairway flanked by landscaped lawns

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on black bench at the base of the stairs

entered.detail: large red brick university building with arched windows and stone balustrades
white concrete stadium with exposed support beams and columns
wide staircase with red brick and white tile pattern leading up the hill
well-manicured green grass on sloping terrain between walkways
vintage-style black lamppost with glass globe

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a wide ceremonial stairway on a university campus. A woman sits on a bench to the right while the character begins ascending the stairs. Historic brick buildings line the left side and a modern white stadium structure dominates the right, with landscaped green lawns filling the spaces between.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper campus plaza with archway building

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters open plaza area with different ground pattern
turns right to walk along the stadium side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the upper plaza, passing a security guard and turning right toward the stadium

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the archway building
pedestrian in red pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: low red brick building with multiple arched openings at the top of the stairs
open paved area with geometric red and white tile pattern

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit upper plaza at the top of the stairs. A security guard stands near an archway building straight ahead. The character turns right, passing the guard and a pedestrian in red pants, moving away from the historic building toward the stadium structure.

events.description: approaches and enters the covered walkway beneath the stadium stands

agents.ego_description: walking along the stadium exterior, approaching the covered corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete support columns and beams of the stadium overhang
low red brick wall with planters on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the side of the stadium, passing under the concrete overhang. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction. The open plaza transitions to a more enclosed space as the character approaches the covered walkway, with brick retaining walls and planters lining the right side.

agents.ego_description: walking through the long covered corridor with numbered doors on the left side

entered.detail: long corridor with overhead concrete beams providing shade
beige storage doors marked with numbers 9 and 10
planters with pink and purple flowers along the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered walkway beneath the stadium stands, where the lighting becomes diffused and shaded. Numbered storage doors line the left wall while flower beds sit atop the brick retaining wall on the right. The corridor extends forward with distant campus buildings visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the base of a wide ceremonial stairway up into the shaded corridors of a university campus. It begins with the character ascending the stairs between historic brick buildings and a modern white stadium, passing a woman resting on a nearby bench. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a sunlit upper plaza where they pass a security guard and a pedestrian before turning toward the stadium structure. The environment then shifts from the open plaza to a more enclosed space as the camera moves under a concrete overhang and alongside brick retaining walls. Finally, the shot transitions into a covered walkway beneath the stadium stands, where the bright daylight becomes diffused and shaded among numbered storage doors and flower beds.
